title: On An Edinburgh Advocate
content:
In youth with diligence he toiled
         A Roman nose to gain,
    But though a decent pug was spoiled,
         A pug it did remain.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Fuller Murray, titled "On An Edinburgh Advocate", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
